description_long: This is a modern electric guitar with a sleek, contoured solid body finished in a dark, metallic color. The body features two cutaways for easy access to the higher frets and is equipped with multiple control knobs and a pickup selector switch. The neck is long and slender, with a contrasting lighter fretboard and clearly visible frets and inlays. The headstock is sharply angled and features a unique, aggressive design with all tuning pegs aligned on one side. The bridge and pickups are mounted on the body, with the pickups arranged in a standard configuration for versatile sound options. The overall design is ergonomic and visually striking, suitable for contemporary music genres and urban performance settings.
description: A sleek, modern electric guitar with a contoured dark body, light fretboard, and a sharply angled headstock. Features include multiple pickups, control knobs, and a distinctive, aggressive design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim body profile, long neck, and the placement of control knobs and pickups.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full length of the neck, the fretboard, and the unique headstock shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body contour, neck alignment, and hardware layout.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the pickup arrangement, control knobs, and the symmetrical double-cutaway body shape.
attribute_headstock_design: Sharp, angled headstock with all tuning pegs on one side and no visible logo
